narrative: A seeded 22-minute delay changes projected fuel reserve to 12%, at the 12% policy floor. The supplied review option is Eastbridge Travel Centre, 14 km away with a planned 12-minute detour. Driver review is required before any external action.
limitations: Seeded local demo; no live GPS, traffic, map, fuel-price, telematics, or dispatch feed.
